title: Minty Blends
description: A mod about herbs, flowers, and blending them.
body:
# Minty Blends
A mod about combining herbs and flowers to make the most of their unique properties.

![Made for Mod Garden: Nature](https://badger-api-staging.worldwidepixel.ca/cozy?gradientStart=6a2b16&gradientEnd=46230f&lineOne=Made%20for&lineTwo=Mod%20Garden:%20Nature&colourOne=FFFFFF&colourTwo=47cd40&iconUrl=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModGardenEvent/art/main/graphics/64x/mod-garden/nature/icon.png)

Check out [Mod Garden: Nature](https://modgarden.net/events/mod-garden/nature)!


## New Plants

<details>
<summary>View</summary>

Herbs can be found in the overworld in many different biomes. They can't be bonemealed, but they can spread occasionally when Bees drop pollen on them:

![A herb spreading into the block next to it when a fuzzy pollen-carrying Bee flies over it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x4c552hp/images/12d406457b25635c8e038914c1480e24fc7debd4.gif)

---

Minty Blends adds some cute flowers, too! The ancient Hortensia can have a few different colours depending on the location it was grown in.
![Hortensias growing in a small field. The ones planted in warmer Savanna soil have grown blue flowers, while the ones in the more temperate Forest soil grew purple ones.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/141ad664f4bf2f21001b8ddff11995a04fad4d4d.png)

</details>



## Kettle Brewing

<details>
<summary>View</summary>

The Kettle can blend herbs and flowers together, combining their effects. Some blends may produce special teas.  It needs its burner to be lit with a Flint and Steel to start brewing:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9mUrE5yoowo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>

## Censers


<details>
<summary>View</summary>

Censers apply their herbal effects in a radius around the user. They can be lit while holding one with a Flint and Steel in the offhand:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yKEiKVtOcBo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>
